headline: JPMorgan Initiates ResMed (RMD) With “Overweight” Rating and A$37.6 PT
summary: With strong revenue growth projections, ResMed Inc. (NYSE:RMD) secures a spot on our list of the best long-term ASX stocks to buy right now. On April 15, 2026, JPMorgan initiated coverage of ResMed Inc. (NYSE:RMD) with an “Overweight” rating and an A$37.60 price target, stating that the company remains well-positioned even as investor attention increasingly […]
